title: John Guttag
body: John Vogel Guttag (born March 6, 1949) is an American computer scientist, professor, and former head of the department of electrical engineering and computer science at MIT. He conducts research on computer networks and medical applications of AI as co-lead of the MIT Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory's Networks and Mobile Systems Group.
categories: Fellows of the Association for Computing Machinery
